nodes.text:
Patient reports altered bowel habit and abdominal discomfort over 12 weeks with gradual worsening. Additional symptoms include early satiety. Past medical history significant for type 2 diabetes.

Imaging:
CT colonography on 09/04/2024: large polypoid lesion in rectosigmoid junction. If cancer T2 N0 M0
